title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 80.
content:
There was an Old Man who said, "Hush!
    I perceive a young bird in this bush!"
    When they said - "Is it small?"
    He replied - "Not at all!
    It is four times as big as the bush!"
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 80.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
